page.description: Import a NetMonster (.ntm) or NetMonitor file and cross-check cells against the database

file.dropHint: Drop a file here or click to select
file.constraints: NetMonster (.ntm) or NetMonitor (.csv, .clf) · max 10 MB · up to 20 000 rows

warning.pciMissingFromDb: This value is missing from the database

errors.noValidRows: No valid rows found in file
errors.truncated: File is large, only the first {{count}} rows were loaded

selection.stationCapWarning: You have exceeded the {{count, number}} station limit
selection.reviewBatchDisabledNoStations: No stations were resolved from the selected rows
selection.reviewBatchDisabledOverLimit: Reduce to {{count, number}} or fewer stations to continue
